lesson.menu_desc: Visiting attractions in the city -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 16 -- Sightseeing
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Marlene Landucci | Aula 16 -- Sightseeing

listenings.text: Good morning, and welcome to your city tour. My name is Marco, and I am your guide today. First, we will visit the old cathedral in the center. It is very beautiful inside, so please be quiet. After that, we will walk to the museum. You need a ticket to enter, but the tour ticket includes it. Inside the museum there is a famous statue that everyone loves. Later, we will see a big monument in the main square. The tour takes about three hours. If you want to take photos, that is fine. Please stay with the group and follow me. Let us begin our tour. I hope you enjoy the day.

Hi Marlene, this is Sofia. I am so excited about tomorrow. I want to visit the cathedral first, because it opens early. Then I would like to see the museum with the famous statue. We need to buy our tickets online tonight, because the line is very long. After lunch, we can join a walking tour with a guide. The guide knows all the history of the monuments. Do not forget your camera and good shoes. We will walk a lot. Call me tonight so we can plan everything. See you tomorrow, and good night.

extra_audio.text: First, you buy a ticket for the city tour. Then you meet the guide near the cathedral. After that, you visit the cathedral and stay quiet inside. Next, you walk to the museum to see the famous statue. Finally, you take a photo at the big monument in the square.
